title: Asian Stocks Drop at Open, China Set to Return: Markets Wrap
description: Asian shares fell at the open after fresh anxiety over the impact of artificial intelligence on company profits roiled Wall Street, while uncertainty over tariffs added to traders’ concerns.
content: Asian shares fell at the open after fresh anxiety over the impact of artificial intelligence on company profits roiled Wall Street, while uncertainty over tariffs added to traders’ concerns.
